name: scientific-computing-reproduction
description: Skill-first computational math reproduction skill pack; Codex manifest only, not the workflow driver.

interface.shortDescription: Skill-first computational math reproduction, MATLAB runtime, tuning, visualization, and reporting.
interface.longDescription: A coding-agent Skill pack for computational math research-code reproduction. It routes tasks through a shared skills registry, keeps humans in the approval loop, and writes compact evidence under outputs/{run_id}/.
defaultPrompt: Inspect this computational math repo and write plan.md.
Check whether this MATLAB code can be reproduced safely.
